Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Major Update: Security System, Admin Panel & Database Improvements

Features Added:
- Secure authentication system with password hashing \(SHA-256 + Salt\)
- User registration with admin approval workflow
- Role-based access control \(admin, manager, sales, viewer\)
- Account lockout after 5 failed login attempts
- Admin Panel with dashboard, user management, audit logs
- Soft delete for clients and quotations \(admin only\)
- Audit trail for all data changes
- Search, filter and pagination for overlays
- Export to CSV/Excel functionality
- Professional loading indicators

Files Changed:
- anvil.yaml: New users and audit_log tables, updated schema
- AuthManager.py: New authentication module
- QuotationManager.py: Added audit trail and soft delete
- LoginForm: New secure login with registration
- AdminPanel: New professional admin interface
- clients.js, quotations.js: Added search, pagination, loading
- cylinders.js: Fixed duplicate event listener

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash("C:\\Users\\moham_ub2xpub\\AppData\\Local\\Microsoft\\WindowsApps\\python.exe" -c "
import yaml

with open\(''client_code/CalculatorForm/form_template.yaml'', ''r'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    data = yaml.safe_load\(f\)

html = data[''container''][''properties''][''html'']

# Find quotationOverlay section
start = html.find\(''quotationOverlay''\)
end = html.find\(''clientOverlay''\)

print\(''=== QUOTATION OVERLAY HTML ===''\)
print\(html[start:end][:1500]\)
")
